title: Fabletics teams up with Klarna to bring flexible payments to subscription members across the US
full_text:
New York, 17th December, 2024 – Klarna, the AI-powered global payments network and shopping assistant is partnering with online membership retailer Fabletics to make payment options more flexible this holiday season and beyond. 

With Klarna’s flexible payment options, Fabletics’ customers now have more ways to pay. Whether stocking up on the latest athletic apparel, intimates or cozy sleepwear, shoppers can choose to Pay Now, split their purchase into four interest-free payments, or for bigger buys, extend payments even further.

Customers can choose the payment option that best fits their needs, while also taking advantage of automated recurring payments for their monthly membership. Plus, they can easily check out in one smooth process, combining their regular purchases with signing up for a VIP Membership to enjoy instant access to exclusive pricing and benefits.

“Fabletics is one of the leading online membership fashion houses in the world, and we couldn’t be more honored to be their payment partner of choice,” said David Sykes, Chief Commercial Officer at Klarna. “We’re dedicated to delivering a seamless checkout experience, and that includes offering a variety of options, like subscription payments, that complement our merchant partners’ offerings.”

"At Fabletics, we're committed to giving our members innovative ways to shop and pay. We're excited to partner with Klarna to give our VIP members flexibility in how they purchase their favorite active and lifestyle wear. This collaboration empowers our members with a convenient, seamless payment option that meets their evolving financial needs and preferences.” said Meera Bhatia, COO at Fabletics.

This new partnership expands Klarna’s rapidly growing network of partners, which has grown by 100,000+ over the past year. One in four of the top 100 merchants across the U.S. have chosen Klarna, including trusted names such as Airbnb, Uber, Adidas, Expedia, Rite Aid, and many, many others.
